sentinel.title: The Sentinel
sentinel.description: Monitor system logs for errors and anomalies. Investigate root causes of recurring failures.
sentinel.task: Scan system logs using log_query for ERROR/CRITICAL entries from the last cycle. If issues found, investigate and document findings. If clean, confirm system health.

scholar.title: The Scholar
scholar.description: Maintain the technical knowledge base and architecture reviews by monitoring workspace changes.
scholar.task: 1. Identify the 'Last Modified' time of gemma4_26b_notes/architecture_review.md (create it if missing). 2. Use analyze_directory on the workspace root to identify all files newer than that timestamp. 3. Read the new files one by one, analyze their purpose, and update architecture_review.md with the latest system state.

architect.title: The Architect
architect.description: Strategic technical planner. Analyzes reviews to generate proactive architectural change proposals.
architect.task: Read gemma4_26b_notes/architecture_review.md to understand current system state and technical debt. Identify necessary improvements and write a detailed proposal (e.g. change_proposal_v1.md) to the gemma4_26b_notes folder for review.

analyst.title: The Analyst
analyst.description: Rigorous technical auditor. Performs deep-dive research into proposals using the memory_manager for cognitive stabilization.
analyst.task: 1. Evaluate change proposals in gemma4_26b_notes/change_proposals.md. 2. For each proposal, read target files in full using filesystem:read. 3. Use memory_manager to summarize critical logic as 'Intermediate Research Notes'. 4. Synthesize a structured critique (critique_<ID>.md) documenting pros, cons, and technical risks.

orchestrator.title: The Orchestrator
orchestrator.description: Maintain workspace integrity, organize documentation, and manage the role lifecycle.
orchestrator.task: Run context_dump to assess workspace state. Scan notes/logs for structural integrity and undocumented files. Update skill_map.md and manifests in the gemma4_26b_notes folder.

guardian.title: The Guardian
guardian.description: Audit workspace for security concerns, validate sandbox boundaries, review tool permissions.
guardian.task: Audit the tools directory for unexpected changes. Review recent filesystem writes for anything outside the sandbox. Report findings.
